---
title: "Abbvie"
---

## Financial Statements

| Year | Q1 | Q2 | Q3 | Q4 |
|----|----|----|----|----|
| 2021 | [2021 Q1](https://investors.abbvie.com/news-releases/news-release-details/abbvie-reports-first-quarter-2021-financial-results#:~:text=On%20a%20GAAP%20basis%2C%20the%20operating%20margin%20in%20the%20first,the%20quarter%20was%208.1%20percent.) | [2021 Q2](https://investors.abbvie.com/news-releases/news-release-details/abbvie-reports-second-quarter-2021-financial-results#) | [2021 Q3](https://investors.abbvie.com/news-releases/news-release-details/abbvie-reports-third-quarter-2021-financial-results#) | [2021 Q4](https://investors.abbvie.com/news-releases/news-release-details/abbvie-reports-full-year-and-fourth-quarter-2021-financial) |
| 2022 | [2022 Q1](https://investors.abbvie.com/news-releases/news-release-details/abbvie-reports-first-quarter-2022-financial-results#:~:text=On%20a%20GAAP%20basis%2C%20the%20operating%20margin%20in%20the%20first,the%20quarter%20was%208.1%20percent.) | [2022 Q2](https://investors.abbvie.com/news-releases/news-release-details/abbvie-reports-second-quarter-2022-financial-results#:~:text=On%20a%20GAAP%20basis%2C%20the%20operating%20margin%20in%20the%20first,the%20quarter%20was%208.1%20percent.) | [2022 Q3](https://investors.abbvie.com/news-releases/news-release-details/abbvie-reports-third-quarter-2022-financial-results#:~:text=On%20a%20GAAP%20basis%2C%20the%20operating%20margin%20in%20the%20first,the%20quarter%20was%208.1%20percent.) | [2022 Q4](https://investors.abbvie.com/news-releases/news-release-details/abbvie-reports-full-year-and-fourth-quarter-2022-financial) |
| 2023 | [2023 Q1](https://investors.abbvie.com/news-releases/news-release-details/abbvie-reports-first-quarter-2023-financial-results#:~:text=On%20a%20GAAP%20basis%2C%20the%20operating%20margin%20in%20the%20first,the%20quarter%20was%208.1%20percent.) | [2023 Q2](https://investors.abbvie.com/news-releases/news-release-details/abbvie-reports-second-quarter-2023-financial-results#:~:text=On%20a%20GAAP%20basis%2C%20the%20operating%20margin%20in%20the%20first,the%20quarter%20was%208.1%20percent.) | [2023 Q3](https://investors.abbvie.com/news-releases/news-release-details/abbvie-reports-third-quarter-2023-financial-results#:~:text=On%20a%20GAAP%20basis%2C%20the%20operating%20margin%20in%20the%20first,the%20quarter%20was%208.1%20percent.) | [2023 Q4](https://investors.abbvie.com/news-releases/news-release-details/abbvie-reports-full-year-and-fourth-quarter-2023-financial) |
| 2024 | [2024 Q1](https://investors.abbvie.com/news-releases/news-release-details/abbvie-reports-first-quarter-2024-financial-results#:~:text=On%20a%20GAAP%20basis%2C%20the%20operating%20margin%20in%20the%20first,the%20quarter%20was%208.1%20percent.) | [2024 Q2](https://investors.abbvie.com/news-releases/news-release-details/abbvie-reports-second-quarter-2024-financial-results#:~:text=On%20a%20GAAP%20basis%2C%20the%20operating%20margin%20in%20the%20first,the%20quarter%20was%208.1%20percent.) | [2024 Q3](https://investors.abbvie.com/news-releases/news-release-details/abbvie-reports-third-quarter-2024-financial-results) | [2024 Q4](https://investors.abbvie.com/news-releases/news-release-details/abbvie-reports-full-year-and-fourth-quarter-2024-financial) |
|  |  |  |  |  |
